package rulefixtures

import (
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for debug_endpoint_in_production: `net/http/pprof` import or `http.Handle("/debug/pprof/", ...)` registration without access control
// fixture polarity: negative; family: security; severity: warning.
func scenario705Negative(mux *http.ServeMux, adminOnly bool) {
	if adminOnly {
		mux.HandleFunc("/internal/health", func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) { w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK) })
	}
}
